name: MongoDB Legacy
description: 使用 Rust 开发的旧版 MongoDB 原生 IPC sidecar 驱动，专门服务 MongoDB 3.6 及更早兼容场景，保留无损 BSON command/find 与大文档 blob 流，并与现代驱动分开发版。 Rust native IPC sidecar driver for MongoDB 3.6 and earlier compatibility, preserving lossless BSON command and find transport plus large-document blob streaming in a separately released legacy variant.
